name: test-server-messages
description: Broadcast scheduled server announcements with sequential or weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

messages.description: Messages to broadcast. Empty arrays are allowed and cause the cronjob to exit quietly.

text.description: Exact message text to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName} placeholders and must contain at least one non-whitespace character.

weight.description: Relative weight used only when order is set to random. Higher values are capped to keep shuffle-bag state bounded.

interval.description: Five-field cron expression for the announcement schedule (minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week). Supports *, ranges, steps, and comma lists. Matching is evaluated in UTC because the module compares against getUTC* values. The module polls every minute and only broadcasts on ticks that match this expression.

order.description: Message rotation strategy. Random uses a weighted shuffle-bag.

broadcast-messages.description: Poll once per minute and broadcast the next configured server message when the configured interval matches.
